name: 命定之诗与黄昏之歌 RPG memory conflict policy

host_state_ownership.player_progression: package state: /主角/等级 /累计经验值 /升级所需经验 /属性点 /生命层级, tools: resolve_combat_round/craft_item/allocate_attribute_points
host_state_ownership.player_resources: package state: /主角/生命值 /法力值 /体力值 /状态效果 /死亡状态, tools: resolve_combat_round/rest/apply_damage_to_player
host_state_ownership.inventory_equipment_skills: package state: /主角/背包 /装备 /技能, tools: manage_item/manage_equipment/commit_skill/generate_loot/draw_card
host_state_ownership.money_fp: package state: /主角/金钱 /命运点数, tools: manage_money/manage_fp/manage_quest/draw_card
host_state_ownership.quest_lifecycle: package state: /任务列表, tools: generate_quest/manage_quest
host_state_ownership.relationships_numeric: package state: /关系列表/*/好感度 and contracts, tools: update_affection/manage_contract
host_state_ownership.news_columns: package state: /新闻, tools: news-writer/change_scene/patch_state structured fields

conflict_policy.rule: RPG memory stores narrative evidence and subjective knowledge only. Current numbers and mechanical state come from package tools/state.
allowed_narrative_examples: 玩家曾向某 NPC 许诺
某秘密在何处被谁听见
某重要道具作为信物被交给谁
某战斗的公开结果或目击者记忆
某地点因玩家行动留下的公开变化
某阵营听说/误信/掌握了什么情报
